title: Hitotsu no uta
overview: At a train station in the suburbs of Tokyo, an accident takes place causing death and injury. Tsuyoshi  is at the scene and witnesses the death of a woman. Right before the accident occurred, Tsuyoshi took a photograph of the woman, who carried a gentle look. Later, Tsuyoshi learns the woman has a daughter named Kiriko. Tsuyoshi meets Kiriko.
